### Post by samiux on 2010-06-15
Hi all,

Ubuntu Samiux Remix Release 3.4 is released today (June 16, 2010 GMT +8 )!

You can download it at [here]("http://www.debian-inside.com").

[What's new?]("http://www.debian-inside.com/weblog/13")

Samiux
